overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy industrial dock area at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic), transitioning from a narrow corridor between shipping containers and metal structures to an open waterfront promenade with views of a distant illuminated cityscape across the foggy water.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock corridor between shipping containers and warehouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a foggy industrial dock corridor, passing yellow shipping containers and metal gantry structures

entered.detail: large metal overhead crane structure with red warning lights on top
stacked corrugated metal shipping containers with industrial markings
metal staircase attached to industrial building
wet concrete dock surface with painted markings
striped plastic construction barriers lining the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow industrial dock corridor at night. Yellow shipping containers line the left side while metal structures and staircases occupy the right. The ground is wet concrete reflecting the warm glow of street lamps. Heavy fog limits visibility, creating an atmospheric industrial environment with no other people present.

events.description: walkway opens to reveal waterfront on the right, transitioning from enclosed industrial corridor to open dock
camera begins turning left to face the water and distant cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront edge then turning to face the water, revealing the city skyline across the foggy bay

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens casting red and orange light on the building facade
metal safety railing along the edge of the dock
calm dark water of the harbor reflecting distant lights
distant illuminated buildings and holographic advertisements across the water

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens up to the waterfront as the camera moves past the industrial containers. Digital billboards cast a warm red glow on the left building. The camera approaches the water's edge, turns left, and reveals a stunning view of a distant cyberpunk cityscape with illuminated towers and holographic signs across the foggy water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront observation deck with city views

events.description: glass observation tower enters the frame on the right side of the waterfront

agents.ego_description: standing at the waterfront edge, panning the view across the foggy water to observe the distant city lights and nearby observation tower

entered.detail: tall modern glass and steel tower with illuminated interior and external elevator shaft
red and white navigation markers floating in the water
metal railing along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera pans across the foggy waterfront, showcasing the distant cyberpunk city skyline with its glowing holographic advertisements and illuminated towers. The water is calm and dark, reflecting the orange and red city lights. A modern glass observation tower with an external elevator comes into view on the right, standing prominently against the foggy night sky. The atmosphere is serene and atmospheric, with heavy fog obscuring the farthest buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast, illuminated cyberpunk waterfront. It begins by navigating a narrow passage of wet concrete flanked by yellow shipping containers and metal staircases, where heavy fog and warm street lamps create a dense, atmospheric mood. As the camera moves past the containers, the walkway opens up toward the water's edge, with digital billboards casting a warm red glow across the surrounding architecture. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left to reveal a sprawling cityscape of glowing holographic signs and illuminated towers shimmering across the dark, calm water. Finally, the view pans across the foggy horizon to showcase the distant skyline before settling on a modern glass observation tower with an external elevator standing prominently against the night sky.
